name: NACA
description_short: NACA is a free credit assistance provider based in Newark, New Jersey. Rated 4.7/5 with 2,633 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
NACA is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Newark, New Jersey. With 2,633 Google reviews and a 4.7/5.0 rating, NACA has built a significant presence in the local free credit assistance market.

Operating as a mortgage broker, NACA provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Newark offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. NACA provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Newark, New Jersey area who are considering NACA should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
